sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50043" key="i(eroqu/sion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερο-θύσιον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n50043.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place of sacrifice</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:32:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.32.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
